/usr/bin/c++ -g -pie -Wl,-z,relro,-z,now CMakeFiles/vhsm_crypto_test.dir/rsa_test.cpp.o CMakeFiles/vhsm_crypto_test.dir/aes_gcm_test.cpp.o CMakeFiles/vhsm_crypto_test.dir/ecc_test.cpp.o -o vhsm_crypto_test  -Wl,-rpath,/home/gilbert/anaconda3/lib ../../../src/crypto/libvhsm_crypto.a /usr/lib/x86_64-linux-gnu/libcrypto.so /home/gilbert/anaconda3/lib/libgtest_main.so.1.11.0 /usr/lib/x86_64-linux-gnu/libssl.so /usr/lib/x86_64-linux-gnu/libcrypto.so /home/gilbert/anaconda3/lib/libgtest.so.1.11.0
